title: ROW POLICY does not respect FINAL
description:
Example: https://fiddle.clickhouse.com/225424c2-872a-4ee4-a118-3d20b99639b6
```
create table tab (x UInt32, y String, version UInt32) engine = ReplacingMergeTree(version) order by x;
insert into tab values (1, 'aaa', 1), (2, 'bbb', 1);
insert into tab values (1, 'ccc', 2);
CREATE ROW POLICY pol1 ON default.tab USING y != 'ccc' TO default;
select * from tab final;
```
Current result
```
1	aaa	1
2	bbb	1
```
Should be
```
2	bbb	1
```
This happens because the row policy filter is applied before FINAL.
Let's add a setting that allows applying the row policy after FINAL. If the expression depends only on columns in ORDER BY, apply it always before FINAL as usual.
poc: create table tab (x UInt32, y String, version UInt32) engine = ReplacingMergeTree(version) order by x;
key_bug_features: Row policy filter applied before FINAL
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE tab2 (a Int32, b Float64, c Nullable(String), d Date) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY a;
CREATE ROW POLICY pol2 ON default.tab2 USING b > 2.0 TO default;
SELECT * FROM tab2 WHERE c IS NOT NULL;
